Rotation

Core Loop

  1. 1Build with Recuperation and Vanguard's Shield until your spender window is ready.
  2. 2Spend with Deflector, Glorious Arena, and Honorbound before you overcap or during burst windows.

Opener and Setup

  1. 1Open with Bastion to set up the pull.
  2. 2Open with Bloodletter to set up the pull.

Cooldowns

  1. 1Use Bastion during your main damage or recovery window.
  2. 2Use Bloodletter during your main damage or recovery window.
  3. 3Use Brace during your main damage or recovery window.
